---
title: "Media"
---

Selected coverage of my research and activities in university news outlets, podcasts, and publications.

::: {.media-list}

::: {.media-item}
[**"Matthew Mair: Fighting climate change, economically"**](https://communicatingscience.isce.vt.edu/research-stories/Matthew_Mair.html)
[Virginia Tech Center for Communicating Science · January 2026]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"Ph.D. Student Spotlight: Matthew Mair — Focused on the Future of the Environment"**](https://aaec.vt.edu/news/articles/mair.html)
[Department of Agricultural and Applied Economics, Virginia Tech · September 2025]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"Management, MBA, and Economics students to present their research at 'Student Research and Creative Endeavors' event"**](https://business.appstate.edu/news/management-mba-and-economics-students-present-their-research-student-research-and-creative)
[Walker College of Business News, Appalachian State University · April 2024]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**Three photographs published in *Sanctuary* Literary Magazine**](https://www.srhconline.org/publications)
[Southern Regional Honors Conference · 2024]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
**"The Honors College Hosts First Ever Honors Club Expo"**
[Honors Wednesday Memo, Appalachian State University · December 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"Economics student studies the impact of sea level rise through undergraduate research experience"**](https://business.appstate.edu/news/economics-student-works-affect-sea-level-rise)
[Walker College of Business News, Appalachian State University · May 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"Announcing the 2022–23 App State CAS Outstanding Seniors"**](https://cas.appstate.edu/news/announcing-2022-23-app-state-cas-outstanding-seniors)
[College of Arts and Sciences News, Appalachian State University · May 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"016: App State at the United Nations Climate Change Conference"**](https://sustain.podcasts.appstate.edu/e/016-app-state-at-the-united-nations-climate-change-conference/) [Podcast]{.badge .badge-media}
[*Find Your Sustain Ability*, Appalachian State University · April 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
**"Honors College student and Chancellor's Scholar accepted into the C2C REU Program"**
[Honors Wednesday Memo, Appalachian State University · April 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
**"Honors College students present at the SHRC Annual Conference 2023"**
[Honors Wednesday Memo, Appalachian State University · April 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"6 App State students observe world climate policymaking at UN climate conference"**](https://today.appstate.edu/2023/01/23/cop27)
[Walker College of Business News, Appalachian State University · January 2023]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"App State students attend COP27, the 27th annual United Nations Climate Change Conference"**](https://business.appstate.edu/news/app-state-students-attend-cop27-27th-annual-united-nations-climate-change-conference)
[Walker College of Business News, Appalachian State University · December 2022]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
**"Honors College students travel to Egypt to attend the 27th annual Conference of Parties on climate change"**
[Honors Wednesday Memo, Appalachian State University · November 2022]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"Student leaders push for mental health wellness days for peers"**](https://theappalachianonline.com/student-leaders-push-for-mental-health-wellness-days-for-peers/)
[*The Appalachian*, Appalachian State University · March 2021]{.outlet}
:::

::: {.media-item}
[**"App State announces 2020–21 class of Chancellor's Scholars"**](https://today.appstate.edu/2020/10/09/chancellors-scholars)
[*Appalachian Today*, Appalachian State University · October 2020]{.outlet}
:::

:::
